basicPropertyValues.val: A lightweight OWL 2 DL ontology modeling the energy news media landscape as observed through social media posts.
A GenericallyDependentContinuant that represents a news article referenced by an embedded link in a social media post
A GenericallyDependentContinuant that represents a social media account that shares energy news
An owl:Class whose instances are skos:Concept individuals representing subject areas within the energy sector used to classify news articles
A GenericallyDependentContinuant that represents a curated social media feed for energy content
A Site that represents a country region or subnational area relevant to energy news coverage
An Object that represents a company agency or institutional body mentioned in energy news
A GenericallyDependentContinuant that represents a social media post sharing energy content
An Object that represents a news media outlet or website that publishes articles
An owl:Class whose instances are named individuals representing social media platforms
Links an Article to an EnergyTopic individual it covers
Links an Article to a GeographicEntity representing its geographic focus
Links an Organization to an EnergyTopic sector it operates in
Links an Article to an Organization mentioned in its coverage
Links an AuthorAccount or Feed to the SocialMediaPlatform it belongs to
Links a Post to the AuthorAccount who created it
Links an Article to the Publication that published it
Links a Post to the Article it shares via embedded link
The description or summary text of an Article
The handle or username string for an AuthorAccount
The publication date of an Article
The domain name string of a Publication
The headline or title string of an Article
A skos:Concept representing energy affordability bills rate increases and energy poverty
A skos:Concept representing co-location of solar panels and agriculture
A SocialMediaPlatform individual representing the Bluesky social network
A skos:Concept representing switching buildings from gas to electric systems
A skos:Concept representing building energy performance retrofits and distributed generation
A skos:Concept representing carbon capture utilization and storage technologies
A skos:Concept representing climate change and greenhouse gas emissions in the energy context
A skos:Concept representing coal extraction and coal-fired power generation
A skos:Concept representing oil futures gas spot prices and energy commodity trading
A skos:Concept representing community-owned energy projects and cooperatives
A skos:Concept representing acquisitions mergers and corporate stakes in energy companies
A skos:Concept representing critical minerals required for energy technologies
A skos:Concept representing electricity demand from data centers and artificial intelligence workloads
A skos:Concept representing strategies and progress toward reducing carbon emissions
A skos:Concept representing local electricity distribution networks
A skos:Concept representing electric vehicle charging infrastructure and networks
A skos:Concept representing technology efficiency records and breakthrough achievements
A skos:Concept representing electrification of ships ferries buses and other transport
A skos:Concept representing battery and plug-in electric vehicles
A skos:Concept representing the electrification of transport buildings and industry
A skos:Concept representing monitoring and reporting of greenhouse gas emissions
A skos:Concept representing access to modern energy services
A skos:Concept representing investment funding and financial deals in the energy sector
A skos:Concept representing geopolitical dimensions of energy supply trade and security
A skos:Concept representing employment in the energy sector
A skos:Concept representing equity access and justice dimensions of energy systems
A skos:Concept representing pricing trading and wholesale electricity and commodity markets
A skos:Concept representing government policy affecting the energy sector
A skos:Concept representing battery storage and other energy storage technologies
A SKOS concept scheme organizing energy topic individuals into a broader/narrower hierarchy for classifying energy news articles.
A skos:Concept representing environmental impacts and land use of energy projects
A skos:Concept representing energy derived from geological carbon deposits including coal oil and natural gas
A skos:Concept representing nuclear fusion energy research and development
A skos:Concept representing heat energy extracted from the earth
A skos:Concept representing power grid and electricity delivery infrastructure
A skos:Concept representing independent system operators and regional transmission organizations
A skos:Concept representing heat pump technology for building heating and cooling
A skos:Concept representing conventional and pumped-storage hydroelectric power
A skos:Concept representing hydrogen as an energy carrier across production methods
A skos:Concept representing generator interconnection queues and processes
A skos:Concept representing unions and worker organizing in the energy sector
A skos:Concept representing laws and legislative acts affecting energy
A skos:Concept representing energy equipment manufacturing and factories
A skos:Concept representing natural gas including liquefied natural gas and pipeline gas
A skos:Concept representing net-zero emissions targets and commitments
A skos:Concept representing energy from nuclear fission and fusion reactions
A skos:Concept representing crude oil extraction refining and petroleum products
A skos:Concept representing intellectual property and patents in energy technology
A skos:Concept representing permitting and siting processes for energy projects
A skos:Concept representing power purchase agreements between generators and offtakers
A skos:Concept representing financing of specific energy projects
A skos:Concept representing government subsidies tax credits and grants for energy
A skos:Concept representing regulatory actions by energy regulatory bodies
A skos:Concept representing energy generated from naturally replenishing sources such as solar wind and hydro
A skos:Concept representing research development breakthroughs and patents in energy technology
A skos:Concept representing energy efficiency retrofits of existing buildings
A skos:Concept representing rooftop and distributed solar installations on buildings
A skos:Concept representing small modular reactor technology designs
A skos:Concept representing solar photovoltaic and concentrated solar power generation
A skos:Concept representing energy equipment and fuel supply chains
A skos:Concept representing trade tariffs on energy equipment and materials
A skos:Concept representing energy trade disputes and sanctions regimes
A skos:Concept representing high-voltage transmission lines and transmission planning
A SocialMediaPlatform individual representing the Twitter/X social network
A skos:Concept representing waste disposal and pollution from energy production
A skos:Concept representing water consumption by energy facilities
A skos:Concept representing wholesale electricity markets and capacity auctions
A skos:Concept representing onshore and offshore wind power generation
A skos:Concept representing jobs labor and manufacturing in the energy sector
